parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of fuzz applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the fuzz.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the fuzz.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Fuzz Type: Selects the type of fuzz circuit. Type 1 emphasizes the midrange and upper harmonics. Type 2 has more of a scooped frequency response.
